news.paragraph: Gold is trading lower as rising U.S. yields and a stronger dollar follow a surge in last month's inflation data. The recent consumer inflation report serves as a key catalyst driving current market movement and volatility for the asset.
headlines: Exchange-Traded Funds, Equity Futures Fall Pre-Bell Tuesday Amid Consumer Inflation Report Release
Gold Trading Lower as USD and Yields Rise as U.S. Inflation Surged Last Month
